titleStmt.title: SII 38.527: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 527. (A.R. No. 527 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the main gōpura, left of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records the fixing of annual tax on cattle i.e., ten kāśu per sheep, thirty kāśu per cow and hundred kāśu per buffalo in the eight sub-divisions of Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, Mēlvaḻi-nāḍu, Kīḻvaḷi-nāḍu, Vembar-nāḍu, Vaḍavaḻi-nāḍu, Vaḷḷuvappāḍināḍu, Karikālakanna-vaḷanāḍu, Pulivalappaṟṟu and Āmūr-nāḍu. It is also ordered that the cattle, belonging to the Togumāmaṇi-nāyaṉār temple, were exempted from this tax as per the old custom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sārvabhumacakkaravatti pocaḷa śrīvira Irāmanātatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 7vatu
Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu melvaḻināṭu kiḻvaḻināṭu vempārnāṭum vaṭavaḻināṭum vaḷḷuva
ppāṭināṭum karikālakannavaḷanāṭum pulivalappaṟṟum Āmūrnāṭum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Āṭiṟai
y pāṭṭakkaṭamai koḷḷumiṭattu Eṇṇik kaṇṭap payirukku Āṇṭukku Oṉṟukku Āṭu Oṉṟukku pattā
ka vanta kācum pacu Oṉṟukku muppatāka vanta kācum Erumai Oṉṟukku nūṟāka vanta kācum Ivvāṇṭu mutal
Āṇṭu toṟum IppaṭiThe letter ‘ṭi’ is engraved below.ye koḷvatāka tevar tiruvuḷḷamāThe letter ‘mā’ is engraved below.y puravuvariyār pakkale Aiñcu muta(l)lum ci karaṇarkile
niṉaiviṭṭatu Ippaṭi koḷḷumiṭattu Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇi nāyaṉār tiruccurapiThe letter ‘pi’ is engraved above.yum Upaiyamum koyil kuṟu
makkaḷum nikki nikki niṉṟa koyilkaḷukku pūrva mariyāti Uḷḷatu nikki Ippaṭi koḷḷavum cantirātitta
varai Ippaṭi koḷvatu
Eṅkaḷukku naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇi nāyaṉārkku tiṟattāl Oru Āṭum tiṟattāl Oru pacuvum tiṟattāl
kacaipeṭukku merukku per Oṉṟukku pattāka vanta kācu Ippaṭi Āṇṭutoṟum Iṭakkaṭavom .
Digital edition of SII 38.527 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
